title: Semester at Sea
html: Stub. Cruise-ship-based study-abroad program Yahir briefly considered for fall 2024 before the Shanghai decision in 2023 10 17 travel ideas 2032. The fall itinerary was rejected because it covered places (Egypt, Jordan, Vietnam) Yahir had already been to.
